normalized_title: State Planning Policy 7.3 Residential Design Codes Volume 1
scope_summary: The R-Codes Volume 1 provides the planning and design provisions for residential development (single houses, grouped dwellings and multiple dwellings) across Western Australia, applied through local planning schemes. Part B covers single houses R40 and below, grouped dwellings R25 and below and multiple dwellings R10-R25; Part C covers single houses R50 and above, grouped dwellings R30 and above and multiple dwellings R30-R60; Part D sets site area requirements and dwelling yield. Assessment is via deemed-to-comply or design principle (merit) pathways; multiple dwellings in R80+ areas are dealt with by Volume 2.

quality_flags: two/three-column PDF layout interleaves text across columns in extraction; some sentences merge fragments from adjacent columns

Table C (Part C primary controls) column headers are lost in extraction, so several Part C values (site cover 60-85%, heights 8-16m, street setbacks 4m-1m) cannot be reliably attributed to specific R-Codes from text alone
minor mirrored-text artifacts from rotated figure labels (e.g. 'yradnuob edis' for 'side boundary')
internal amendment note confirms Table B columns 3-5 were deleted and replaced by Part D Table D by amendment dated 10 April 2024; this extraction is the consolidated Version 3 of 10 April 2026
